# Rizwanul Islam Afraim

> Portfolio and knowledge base for Rizwanul Islam Afraim, a Dhaka-based systems architect, venture builder, and full-stack operator focused on growth systems, product execution, agentic AI workflows, and portfolio-grade web tools.

Use this file to understand the site at inference time. It summarizes the most useful public pages for AI assistants, agents, search systems, and research tools. Do not confuse Rizwanul Islam Afraim with similarly named legal academics or unrelated public figures; this site is about the technology, venture, and software operator using the Afraim identity.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/): Primary positioning, services, credibility, research links, and navigation to major work.
- [Case Studies](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/case-studies): Portfolio evidence for shipped platforms, systems, and product execution.
- [Projects](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/projects): Product and engineering project index.
- [Services](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/services): Engagement areas across growth operations, product systems, automation, and technical execution.
- [Resume](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/resume): Professional background and execution record.
- [Research](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/research): Research papers and analytical essays.
- [Blog](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/blog): Long-form writing on systems, analytics, AI, and execution.

## Tools

- [Purchasing Power Roadmap](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/tools/purchasing-power): Official historical price-index calculator for comparing local-currency purchasing power across supported countries and available years.
- [Purchasing Power Methodology](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/tools/purchasing-power/methodology): Data-source, caveat, calculation, and country-methodology notes for the purchasing power tool.
- [Bangladesh Purchasing Power Example](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/tools/purchasing-power/bangladesh/1986): Example indexed country/year route for Bangladesh.
- [United States Purchasing Power Example](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/tools/purchasing-power/united-states/1950): Example indexed country/year route for the United States.
- [United Kingdom Purchasing Power Example](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/tools/purchasing-power/united-kingdom/1950): Example indexed country/year route for the United Kingdom.

## Research Highlights

- [Agentic AI as Coordination Infrastructure Technology](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/research/agentic-ai-coordination-infrastructure): Research on agentic AI, coordination costs, firm structure, and economic divergence.
- [Power BI in the AI Era](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/research/power-bi-ai-era-2026-effectiveness): Analysis of business intelligence platforms against AI-driven coding and Python analytics environments.
- [Skill Mismatch and Managerial Shortages in Bangladesh RMG](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/research/skill-mismatch-managerial-shortages-rmg): Research on graduate unemployment and managerial shortages in Bangladesh's garment industry.

## Case Study Examples

- [The Trail](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/projects/the-trail): News aggregation and publishing system.
- [InshortBD](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/projects/inshortbd): Regional news and media platform work.
- [Arrivals Cave](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/projects/arrivals-cave): Booking and customer-flow platform work.
- [Gaari](https://www.rizwanulafraim.com/case-studies/gaari): Mobility platform architecture and venture execution.
